default_chain_documentation: Informational only. Authoritative chain lives in agents.defaults.model in openclaw.json.
Plugin returns no override for default case; agents.defaults.model.primary fires.

image_attachment_routing.symptom: event.attachments comes through empty for Discord image messages despite image being processed downstream
image_attachment_routing.impact: images route to default chain instead of kimi-k2.5; functional but suboptimal
investigation_needed: trace where Discord populates params.images vs event.attachments in message-handler.preflight
check if media-understanding capability bypasses before_model_resolve hook entirely
may need a different hook (before_agent_start?) that sees media params
image_attachment_routing.workaround: none active; falls through to default

discord_slash_intercept.fix_applied: switched from /debug to debug: and longrun: prefixes
discord_slash_intercept.note: Discord gateway preflight intercepts all slash commands before before_model_resolve fires

customer_facing_no_reply.symptom: Opus 4.7 returned NO_REPLY sentinel on 'test routing' in #landlit, suppressing the Discord delivery despite successful routing
customer_facing_no_reply.impact: customers in #landlit/#what-was-drawn would see no response on prompts Opus deems unnecessary to reply to
customer_facing_no_reply.fix_path: agent system-prompt addition for customer_facing_channel_ids: 'You are customer-facing. Always reply substantively. NO_REPLY sentinel is disallowed in these channels.'
customer_facing_no_reply.investigation_needed: find which agent persona file governs replies for these channelIds; modify there, not in the routing plugin

opus_cold_start_cache_write.observation: First Opus call per channel writes 39k tokens to cache ($0.245 sticker, OAuth quota-counted)
opus_cold_start_cache_write.impact: no $$ leak, but eats Max OAuth quota faster than necessary if many channels cold-start
opus_cold_start_cache_write.investigation_later: audit what's in the 39k system prompt; trim if possible

_validation_rule: OAuth path MUST be confirmed via log evidence ('resolved oauth credential', 'used external cli oauth bootstrap'). ANTHROPIC_API_KEY MUST remain absent from daemon env. Cost field is informational sticker pricing — track for awareness but don't gate on it.
_ollama_migration_deadline: 2026-05-21 — Ollama Pro subscription expires. On/before 2026-05-20: swap routing+fallbacks off Ollama. New fallback chain target: codex → minimax/MiniMax-M2.7 → anthropic/claude-opus-4-7. New debug:/longrun: target: anthropic/claude-opus-4-7. New image_attachment_target: minimax/MiniMax-VL-01. Cron scripts using kimi (create-diary*.py) keep using Ollama free tier; refactor to MiniMax only if rate limits bite.
_project_sync_note: Projects synced from Mac via rsync. Local paths above. Missing: ninja-listener and pocket-ninja dirs created empty — need content.
